# Code of Conduct

## Our standards

- Be respectful and welcoming.
- Assume good faith.
- Give credit where due.
- Disagree technically, not personally.

## Unacceptable behavior

- Harassment of any kind.
- Personal attacks.
- Discriminatory language or imagery.
- Sustained disruption of discussion.

## Reporting

Reach the maintainer via the email on the GitHub profile. Reports will be handled privately; retaliation against reporters is not tolerated.

## Scope

Applies to all project spaces: issues, PRs, discussions, and any project-adjacent communication.
